description: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon identified bureaucracy as a 'silent killer' that breeds complacency and inefficiency within organizations. He urged companies to eliminate managers who foster such practices, emphasizing the need to focus on outcomes and share information transparently. Dimon advocates for assigning critical tasks to small, focused teams to increase accountability and speed up decision-making.

title: TVK storms Tamil Nadu but falls short of majority: Who will Vijay ally with?
description: Mega movie star "Thalapathy" Vijay's party, Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), has emerged as a significant force in Tamil Nadu politics, disrupting the DMK and AIADMK's dominance. While TVK secured triple-digit leads in early trends, it fell short of a majority, prompting debate on structural shifts versus celebrity appeal and raising questions about Vijay's solo political path.

title: Commanders, Raiders Eye Former Cowboys CB Trevon Diggs in Free Agency Rumors
description: The Washington Commanders and the Las Vegas Raiders are exploring a move for Trevon Diggs as teams reassess needs after the NFL Draft. The former Dallas Cowboys All-Pro remains a free agent following an inconsistent 2025 season. With strong ties to Dan Quinn, Washington could offer the right system for a comeback. Meanwhile, the Raiders need depth in the secondary. Diggs’ ball-hawking ability still stands out despite injuries and recent struggles, making him a low-risk option with upside as training camp approaches
